gateTitle: This little corner is just for you
gateMessage: Enter your password to open it.
heroEyebrow: a little note, brewed with love
heroSubtitle: This is a small reminder mn l sa2il Wael ino you deserve kel shi hlooo bhal deniii w inik hada bjninnn
arabicTranslation: Surely, it is all for the good.
loveQuote: Ymkin mesh 3atoool a3rif sho 2ool la radiki aw motivate tou bas 3atool ha aa3mil kel shi b2dar 3lay hata ma tnemi za3lini aw m3asbi mei w ino I make sure Little Leila is happy
sushiMessage: Pick a piece — each one is hiding a little note for you.
sushiNote1: You're my favorite person to share a plate with. And yes, you can have the last piece. Always.
sushiNote2: Soy sauce needs wasabi, coffee needs cream, and I need you. That's just science.
sushiNote3: Next sushi date is on me. This note is a coupon — no expiry date, redeemable forever.
footerNote: Made with love, one cup and one petal at a time.
footerSignature: De tout mon cœur à Leila, ton petit nez est la preuve que les choses les plus simples peuvent être les plus belles — il te rend encore plus irrésistible.
